allow: PowerShell($msg = "feat: productos relacionados y recently viewed en pagina de producto`n`n- Agrega seccion con hasta 4 productos de la misma categoria/marca`n- Nuevo componente RecentlyViewed que persiste en localStorage`n- Nueva funcion getRelatedProducts con prioridad: categoria > marca > destacados`n- Fix: setLoading\(false\) no se ejecutaba en todos los caminos de error del login"; git commit -m $msg)
PowerShell(npx next lint --dir app --dir lib 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 80)
PowerShell(npx eslint app/components/orders app/api/orders/[id]/contact lib/email/templates/order-question.ts app/orden/[id]/page.tsx 2>&1)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/products/search-suggestions?q=acrilico" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output $r.Content } catch { Write-Output "Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Output $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/products/search-suggestions?q=cardone" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content | Out-String } catch { Write-Output "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)"; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path node_modules/playwright\) { 'playwright' } elseif \(Test-Path node_modules/puppeteer\) { 'puppeteer' } else { 'none' }; \(Get-Content package.json | ConvertFrom-Json\).scripts.dev)

PowerShell($deadline=\(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(90\); do { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 2000; $log = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\migue\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-migue-Desktop-liz-cabriales\\5db660d4-6ff1-48a8-8ba3-9370acf392b3\\tasks\\b10kiybnn.output" -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } until \($log -match 'Ready' -or \(Get-Date\) -gt $deadline\); $log -match 'Ready'; node "C:\\Users\\migue\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-migue-Desktop-liz-cabriales\\5db660d4-6ff1-48a8-8ba3-9370acf392b3\\scratchpad\\test-collapse.js")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess; Get-Process -Id \($c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique\) | Select-Object Id,ProcessName } else { "Nada escuchando en :3000" })

PowerShell(foreach \($p in 3000,3001,3002\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { taskkill /PID $_ /F 2>$null } } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; foreach \($p in 3000,3001,3002\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "$p ocupado" } else { "$p libre" } })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output \("PID $_ = " + $p.ProcessName\) } } else { Write-Output "nada escuchando en 3000" })
